stemHtml: After take-off from runway 08L with clearance to climb straight ahead to 6000 ft then turn right heading 110, reporting passing 4000 ft, a receiver failure occurs in VMC. The blind transmission should end with...

options.a: PASSING 6000 FT, NEXT REPORT AT 1201. CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PLANNED."
options.b: AT 4000 FT, NEXT REPORT AT 6000 FT. HEADING 110 SPEED 160 KNOTS."
options.c: PASSING 4000 FT, NEXT REPORT 6000 FT. CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PLANNED."
options.d: AT 4000 FT, NEXT REPORT AT 6000 FT. ALL STATIONS RADIO CHECK."
